prBodyNotes: :warning: After bumping kind, run `make sync-supported-versions && make codegen` and commit the result to update `.github/supported-k8s.json` (and the generated docs). The script recomputes both `supported` (newest two kind-published minors) and `next` (newest Kubernetes release not yet covered by kind). The `Verify supported-versions table` CI check will fail until this is done.

packageRules.description: The operator self-image in source install manifests is a release-managed placeholder, not a dependency Renovate should pin.

customManagers.description: Track sigs.k8s.io/kind release pin in supported-k8s.json
Track the e2e curl helper image
